## X-Sense Home Security v1.2.6.27

### 🎥 Camera WebRTC
- Adds the APK live-view keepalive request while a WebRTC camera session is opening.
- Sends `/device/keepalive` with the camera serial and `seconds=30`, matching the Android live-view path.

### 🔎 Debug Logging
- Logs successful and failed camera live keepalive attempts during WebRTC startup.
